mapper.sql: select id, gallery_name, description, image_count, cover_url, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_gallery
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0' and gallery_name like concat('%', #{galleryName}, '%')
order by create_time desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_gallery(gallery_name, description, image_count, cover_url, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{galleryName}, #{description}, #{imageCount}, #{coverUrl}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update tdw_gallery g set g.image_count = (select count(1) from tdw_gallery_image i where i.gallery_id = #{id} and i.del_flag = '0'), g.cover_url = ifnull((select i.image_url from tdw_gallery_image i where i.gallery_id = #{id} and i.del_flag = '0' order by i.create_time desc, i.id desc limit 1), ''), g.update_time = now() where g.id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
update tdw_gallery set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
